title: Gooey Syrian Blueberry Crumble
description: A herbal and gooey monsoon Syrian dish featuring blueberries, with a low-sodium-friendly twist.
instructions: Mix blueberry jam, yogurt, flour crumbs, applesauce, vanilla extract, and cinnamon powder together until smooth.
Add low-sodium granulated sugar, continuing to mix until desired consistency is reached. The mixture should be thick but pourable.
Sprinkle the mixture evenly on top of a pre-baked crust (use your choice of gluten-free or whole wheat graham cracker, pie crust, or any other available).
Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly. Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
Serve with low-fat whipped cream or Greek yogurt for a perfect dessert treat.
